race.comment: EQUIVASTER (10) is a former Victorian who ran very well first try in this area over the sharper trip. Fitter and extra trip is a plus. Tricky gate to overcome but expected to go close again. LEO DAVINCI (4) is another drawn wide but should feature. Placed last two, the latest this course and distance, and will be winding up late. DA SILVER FLASH (9) was narrowly beaten at a similar trip fresh, finishing fourth but just over a length from the winner. Aided by the low draw and is likely to feature. GUBER (3) was runner-up this course and distance two back before getting too far back latest. Blinkers on and has claims. SURF SOUL (7) has claims if presented on song.
